name: Imposing Pressure
description:
This upgrade can only be attached once per game.

This model gains the following abilities:

granted_abilities.name: Shattered Asset
granted_abilities.text: When this model is dealt 2 or more damage, this model must discard an upgrade with this ability. Then, reduce damage dealt by 2 (to a minimum of 0).

granted_abilities.name: Towering Figure
granted_abilities.text: This model is unaffected by severe and hazardous terrain and may move through other models.

extraction_notes: The LIMITATIONS section shows a single dash '-', indicating no limitations
The description text includes the attachment restriction and precedes the granted abilities
Two abilities are granted: Shattered Asset and Towering Figure
